final:
// // This module implements a 16-bit shift register with parallel load capability. The shift register has a clock input, a reset input, a load input, and a 16-bit input data bus. When the load input is high, the shift register should load the input data. When the load input is low, on each clock cycle, the contents of the register should shift left by one bit. The least significant bit (LSB) should be filled with 1 during shifting. The shift register should also be reset to all 1s when the reset input is high.
module shift_register(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [15:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] q
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        q <= 16'b0;
    end else if (load) begin
        q <= data_in;
    end else begin
        q <= {1'b0, q[15:1]}; // Shift right and fill MSB with 0
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 16-bit shift register with parallel load capability. The shift register has a clock input, a reset input, a load input, and a 16-bit input data bus. When the load input is high, the shift register should load the input data. When the load input is low, on each clock cycle, the contents of the register should shift left by one bit. The least significant bit (LSB) should be filled with 1 during shifting. The shift register should also be reset to all 1s when the reset input is high.
